name: Home Affairs Section
strapLine: The Home Affairs Section covers topics including policing and criminal justice, immigration, civil law, national security, media, equality and human rights.

name: Social and General Statistics Section
strapLine: The Social and General Statistics Section covers statistics on policy areas including health, education, crime, demographics, housing, transport, energy, environment, elections and migration.

name: Economic Policy and Statistics Section
strapLine: The Economic Policy and Statistics Section covers policy on topics including the economy, trade and public spending, as well as statistics on a wider range of policy areas, including businesses, employment and poverty.

name: Business and Transport Section
strapLine: The Business and Transport Section covers topics including transport, pensions, taxation, financial systems and institutions, corporate matters, and employment.

name: Social Policy Section
strapLine: The Social Policy Section covers topics including social security, schools, higher and further education, social services, health and housing.

name: Science and Environment Section
strapLine: The Science and Environment Section covers topics including energy, climate change, agriculture, flooding, telecommunications, planning, artificial intelligence, science and technology, medicine and public health.

name: Parliament and Constitution Centre
strapLine: The Parliament and Constitution Centre covers topics including Parliament, central government, local government, devolution, elections, the courts and the constitution.
